RewardMeaningText: The Standard Path turns Dungeon Alpha into a sharper mana_shard spike, but only if City A can absorb the extra recovery strain.
CityImpactMeaningText: Creates a bigger mana_shard cushion for City A, but the mixed route leaves less dispatch stability behind than the Rest Path.
RecommendationShiftText: City A can press its shard advantage after the Standard Path, but the next dispatch should account for the rougher recovery window.
